LineNumber.description: The line the player is on (e.g. 1, 2, 3, or 4)

Position.description: The player's primary position. Possible values: C; RW; LW; D; or G

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

Name.description: The full name of the player on the line

Shoots.description: The hand the player shoots the puck with (right or left)

LineType.description: The type of line the player is on (e.g. EvenStrength (EV); PowerPlay (PP); ShortHanded (SH))
